text:
Spot (ポチ, Pochi) was a 'human-dog' of Yunju. Spot's name was given by the latter upon subjugating and owning him as a "pet", his real name is unknown. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 192 

Appearance

Spot was an average man with white hair, presumably his hair turned white from the extreme amount of stress from being cruelly abused by Yunju as well as the constant impending doom of being executed by the latter. He also wore no clothes, with only a collar and leash around his neck, as per the Chimera Ant's will. Much like Rover, his tears never stopped in his appearances. 

Personality

With Spot's mind, body, and spirit were broken by being "tamed" by Yunju, he and Rover acted like 'human-dogs' and was consistently fearful and terrified for their lives. Together, they did everything in their power to try and survive under the cruel reign of Yunju, no matter how pitiful it was. 

Background

He was one of Gyro's men before getting captured by Yunju. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

After Yunju's team attacks the hidden D² Manufacturing Plant in NGL, Rover and he are made 'human-dogs' by the Chimera Ant. When Kite, Gon, and Killua arrive at the factory, Spot begs them to help the two of them, but Yunju intervenes by killing him. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In the Viz translation of Chapter 193, by mistake or choice of adaptation, Mosquito says "Fido" instead of the Spot's nomination.
